name: Caramel Chocolate Eclairs
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup chocolate ganache, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. With a small paring knife, pierce a small hole at each end of each eclair.
2. Fill each eclair with caramel pastry cream using a pastry bag fitted with a small plain tip. Insert the tip into one hole and squeeze to fill. Remove the tip, insert it into the other hole, and repeat until all eclairs are filled.
3. Use a small offset spatula to glaze each eclair with chocolate ganache. Allow the ganache to set before serving.
Yield: 12 servings
